title: DREAMS. JWST Spectroscopy of a $z=8.3$ Galaxy with an ALMA Dust Continuum Detection: Early Dust, Very High $T_{\rm dust}$, and a Multi-wavelength [OIII] Ratio Discrepancy
summary: We present a deep DREAMS JWST/NIRSpec MSA medium-grating spectrum of MACS0416-Y1, a galaxy at $z=8.312$ with the highest-redshift ALMA dust continuum detection to date, in order to characterize its properties together with archival IFU and ALMA data. The deep NIRSpec spectrum reveals a broad H$β$ line with a width of $\sim1100$ km s$^{-1}$. We interpret it as a broad-line AGN whose line diagnostics are consistent with AGN activity across its clumpy structure, given the absence of little red dot signatures. MACS0416-Y1 clearly shows [OIII]4363 emission, suggesting a moderately low metallicity of $12+\log(\mathrm{O/H})=7.86^{+0.09}_{-0.08}$ ($0.15~Z_\odot$). The combination of [CII]158$μ$m and dust continuum emission indicates low dust mass ratios of $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm gas})=-3.60^{+0.29}_{-0.22}$ and $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm metal})=-0.95^{+0.29}_{-0.20}$. Because the metallicity of MACS0416-Y1 is around the critical metallicity of $0.1\textrm{-}0.2~Z_\odot$, the system is expected to undergo dust growth, explaining these low dust mass ratios as well as its small dust mass, $M_{\rm dust}\sim10^6~M_\odot$. The intense UV radiation from the AGN may contribute to a high dust temperature of $T_{\rm dust}\simeq 91^{+62}_{-35}$ K, boosting the dust-continuum emission above the ALMA detection limit despite the small $M_{\rm dust}$ at $z>8$. We find a very high total flux ratio of [OIII]88$μ$m/[OIII]5007 = $0.26 \pm 0.06$ in MACS0416-Y1, above predictions from single ionized nebular models at any electron density. This discrepancy suggests that the [OIII]88$μ$m and [OIII]5007 trace largely distinct regions, with the optical line suppressed in dusty nebulae, and thus requires careful interpretation when combining optical and infrared emission lines in JWST+ALMA studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用JWST/NIRSpec对z=8.312的星系MACS0416-Y1进行观测，发现其存在宽线AGN、中等低金属丰度、极低尘埃质量比，以及异常的[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比，表明光学和红外发射线示踪了不同区域。
AI.motivation: 为了表征目前红移最高的ALMA尘埃连续谱探测星系MACS0416-Y1的物理性质，结合JWST、IFU和ALMA多波段数据，特别是理解早期宇宙中AGN活动、尘埃性质和金属丰度的相互作用。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRSpec MSA中分辨率光栅光谱观测，结合存档IFU和ALMA数据，分析Hβ宽线、[OIII]4363发射线、[CII]158μm、尘埃连续谱以及[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比等多波段谱线特征。
AI.result: 发现宽线AGN（Hβ线宽~1100 km/s）、金属丰度12+log(O/H)=7.86（0.15太阳丰度）、极低尘埃质量比(log(M_dust/M_gas)~-3.60, log(M_dust/M_metal)~-0.95)、尘埃质量~10^6 M⊙、尘埃温度~91 K，以及非常高的[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比0.26±0.06。
AI.conclusion: MACS0416-Y1的金属丰度接近临界值（0.1-0.2太阳丰度），正处于尘埃增长阶段；AGN强紫外辐射导致尘埃温度升高；[OIII]88μm与[OIII]5007示踪不同区域，光学线在尘埃星云中被抑制，因此在JWST+ALMA联合研究中需谨慎解读光学与红外发射线数据。

recommendation.reason: 该论文研究z=8.3星系MACS0416-Y1，涉及尘埃连续谱探测、尘埃质量、尘埃温度、[CII]和[OIII]谱线，与用户Zotero画像中的dust、dense gas、high-redshift星系、ALMA、JWST等主题高度匹配。论文聚焦高红移星系的多相气体和尘埃性质，属于用户优先兴趣领域。虽然未直接涉及强引力透镜，但高红移星系物理是核心关注点。作者中无核心作者，但主题和方法契合度很高。
recommendation.topic_fit: 高红移星系尘埃和气体性质，与用户画像中的dust、dense gas、high-redshift星系、ALMA、JWST等主题高度匹配。
recommendation.method_fit: 结合JWST/NIRSpec光谱、ALMA尘埃连续谱和[CII]线等多波段数据，与用户画像中常用的多波段观测方法一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表中无用户核心作者，但Tom J. L. C. Bakx在用户画像中有一定权重。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 发现z>8星系中极低尘埃质量比和高[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比，具有较高新颖性。
recommendation.negative_reason: 无强引力透镜内容，但高红移星系物理是用户优先兴趣，不构成降分理由。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了深度DREAMS JWST/NIRSpec MSA中分辨率光栅光谱对MACS0416-Y1（一个红移$z=8.312$的星系，拥有迄今最高红移的ALMA尘埃连续谱探测）的观测结果，并结合存档的IFU和ALMA数据来表征其性质。深NIRSpec光谱揭示了一条宽H$β$发射线，其宽度约为$\sim1100$ km s$^{-1}$。我们将其解释为一个宽线活动星系核（AGN），其线诊断结果与其团块结构中的AGN活动一致，且未发现小红点特征。MACS0416-Y1清晰地显示出[OIII]4363发射线，表明其金属丰度中等偏低，为$12+\log(\mathrm{O/H})=7.86^{+0.09}_{-0.08}$（$0.15~Z_\odot$）。[CII]158$μ$m发射线与尘埃连续谱发射的结合表明，尘埃质量比很低，分别为$\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm gas})=-3.60^{+0.29}_{-0.22}$和$\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm metal})=-0.95^{+0.29}_{-0.20}$。由于MACS0416-Y1的金属丰度接近临界值$0.1\textrm{-}0.2~Z_\odot$，该系统预计正处于尘埃增长阶段，这解释了这些低尘埃质量比以及其较小的尘埃质量$M_{\rm dust}\sim10^6~M_\odot$。来自AGN的强烈紫外辐射可能导致了较高的尘埃温度$T_{\rm dust}\simeq 91^{+62}_{-35}$ K，从而在$z>8$时尽管$M_{\rm dust}$很小，仍使尘埃连续谱发射增强至ALMA探测限以上。我们发现MACS0416-Y1中[OIII]88$μ$m/[OIII]5007的总流量比非常高，为$0.26 \pm 0.06$，超过了任何电子密度下单一电离星云模型的预测。这一差异表明，[OIII]88$μ$m和[OIII]5007主要示踪了截然不同的区域，光学谱线在尘埃星云中被抑制，因此在JWST+ALMA联合研究中结合光学和红外发射线时需要谨慎解读。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：MACS0416-Y1的金属丰度接近临界值（0.1-0.2太阳丰度），正处于尘埃增长阶段；AGN强紫外辐射导致尘埃温度升高；[OIII]88μm与[OIII]5007示踪不同区域，光学线在尘埃星云中被抑制，因此在JWST+ALMA联合研究中需谨慎解读光学与红外发射线数据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST /NIRSpec F150W image (rest-frame UV continuum) of Y1 in grayscale with 850 \(\mu\) m continuum contours at 2 \(\sigma\) , 3 \(\sigma\) , 4 \(\sigma\) , 5 \(\sigma\) , 6 \(\sigma\) , and 7 \(\sigma\) levels overlaid in yellow. The rest-frame UV peaks, E, C, and W, are labeled in white, while the dust continuum peaks, D1 and D2, are marked in yellow. The red boxes indicate the slit footprint, with each segment corresponding to an individual spaxel.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Y1的JWST/NIRSpec F150W图像（静止系紫外连续谱），以灰度显示，并叠加了850 \(\mu\) m连续谱等高线，置信水平分别为2 \(\sigma\) 、3 \(\sigma\) 、4 \(\sigma\) 、5 \(\sigma\) 、6 \(\sigma\) 和7 \(\sigma\) （黄色）。静止系紫外峰值E、C和W以白色标注，尘埃连续谱峰值D1和D2以黄色标注。红色方框表示狭缝覆盖范围，每个片段对应一个独立的空间像素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Moment 0 (top), 1 (middle), and 2 (bottom) maps of [ Oiii ] 5007. Pixels with S/N \( The contours show the NIRCam F150W image at 2 \(\sigma\) , 5 \(\sigma\) , 8 \(\sigma\) , 11 \(\sigma\) , 14 \(\sigma\) , and 17 \(\sigma\) levels. The gray circle indicates the PSF at the observed wavelength of [ Oiii ] 5007. The PSF FWHM is estimated using the wavelength-dependent relation derived from serendipitous star in the IFU field of view by D’Eugenio et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：[Oiii] 5007的矩0（上）、矩1（中）和矩2（下）图。信噪比S/N \( 的像素。等高线显示NIRCam F150W图像，置信水平分别为2 \(\sigma\) 、5 \(\sigma\) 、8 \(\sigma\) 、11 \(\sigma\) 、14 \(\sigma\) 和17 \(\sigma\) 。灰色圆圈表示[Oiii] 5007观测波长处的点扩散函数（PSF）。PSF半高全宽（FWHM）使用D’Eugenio等人（2024）根据IFU视场中偶然发现的恒星推导出的波长相关关系估算。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Color map of [ Oiii ] 5007 moment-0 map, overlaid with the green contours of NIRCam F150W image at 2 \(\sigma\) , 5 \(\sigma\) , 8 \(\sigma\) , 11 \(\sigma\) , 14 \(\sigma\) , and 17 \(\sigma\) levels, and the red (blue) box denotes the MSA slit integration region (IFU aperture) used for spectral extraction. The IFU aperture size is determined from a growth-curve analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：[Oiii] 5007矩0图的彩色图，叠加了NIRCam F150W图像的绿色等高线（置信水平分别为2 \(\sigma\) 、5 \(\sigma\) 、8 \(\sigma\) 、11 \(\sigma\) 、14 \(\sigma\) 和17 \(\sigma\) ），红色（蓝色）方框表示用于光谱提取的MSA狭缝积分区域（IFU孔径）。IFU孔径大小通过增长曲线分析确定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top: JWST /NIRSpec MSA two-dimensional spectrum of Y1. Bottom: Extracted one-dimensional spectrum integrated over the spaxels shown by the red box in Figure 1 . Emission lines are marked with dashed vertical lines. Flux density is shown in units of \(10^{-19}\ {erg\ s^{-1}\ cm^{-2}\ \AA ^{-1}}\) as a function of observed wavelength.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上：Y1的JWST/NIRSpec MSA二维光谱。下：对图1中红色方框所示空间像素进行积分后提取的一维光谱。发射线以竖直虚线标记。流量密度以观测波长的函数表示，单位为\(10^{-19}\ {erg\ s^{-1}\ cm^{-2}\ \AA ^{-1}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: JWST /NIRSpec IFU one-dimensional spectrum integrated over the blue box in Figure 3 . Emission lines are marked with dashed vertical lines. Flux density is shown in units of \(10^{-19}\ {erg\ s^{-1}\ cm^{-2}\ \AA ^{-1}}\) as a function of observed wavelength.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对图3中蓝色方框进行积分后的JWST/NIRSpec IFU一维光谱。发射线以竖直虚线标记。流量密度以观测波长的函数表示，单位为\(10^{-19}\ {erg\ s^{-1}\ cm^{-2}\ \AA ^{-1}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Emission-line profile fitting of (a)H \(\beta\) and (b)[ Oiii ] 5007, extracted from the spaxel marked by red box in Figure 7 . The black stepped curves and error bars show the observed spectra and their 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties. The green dashed, blue dashed-dotted, and red solid curves represent the narrow, broad, and combined narrow \(+\) broad Gaussian profiles, respectively. The gray curves show the single-Gaussian fits. The bottom panels show the residuals.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从图7中红色方框标记的空间像素提取的(a)H \(\beta\) 和(b)[Oiii] 5007的发射线轮廓拟合。黑色阶梯曲线和误差棒表示观测光谱及其1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度。绿色虚线、蓝色点划线和红色实线分别表示窄、宽以及组合的窄\(+\)宽高斯轮廓。灰色曲线表示单高斯拟合。底部面板显示残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: JWST /NIRCam F150W image of Y1 overlaid with ALMA 850 \(\mu\) m continuum contours at 2 \(\sigma\) , 3 \(\sigma\) , 4 \(\sigma\) , 5 \(\sigma\) , 6 \(\sigma\) , and 7 \(\sigma\) levels in yellow. The rest-frame UV peaks, E, C, and W, are labeled in white. The dust continuum peaks, D1 and D2, are marked in yellow. The red box indicates the position of the spaxel with broad H \(\beta\) emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：Y1的JWST/NIRCam F150W图像，叠加了ALMA 850 \(\mu\) m连续谱等高线，置信水平分别为2 \(\sigma\) 、3 \(\sigma\) 、4 \(\sigma\) 、5 \(\sigma\) 、6 \(\sigma\) 和7 \(\sigma\) （黄色）。静止系紫外峰值E、C和W以白色标注。尘埃连续谱峰值D1和D2以黄色标注。红色方框表示具有宽H \(\beta\) 发射的空间像素位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Top: Color criterion used to identify the characteristic V-shaped spectral energy distributions (SEDs) of LRDs in the F277W \(-\) F444W versus F115W \(-\) F200W plane. The green shaded region indicates the selection window for V-shaped spectral sources, while the blue region marks the locations of cool dwarfs. Bottom: Color criterion used to identify red sources in the F277W \(-\) F444W versus F277W \(-\) F356W plane. The red shaded region denotes the color-selection criterion for red sources. LRD candidates are required to satisfy the V-shaped, red, and compactness criteria. The labeled points with error bars (Y1, C, W, and E) show the measured colors of Y1 and its three clumps. Photometric measurements are taken from Ma et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：上：用于在F277W \(-\) F444W与F115W \(-\) F200W平面中识别LRD特征性V形光谱能量分布（SED）的颜色判据。绿色阴影区域表示V形光谱源的选择窗口，蓝色区域标记冷矮星的位置。下：用于在F277W \(-\) F444W与F277W \(-\) F356W平面中识别红色源的颜色判据。红色阴影区域表示红色源的颜色选择判据。LRD候选体需同时满足V形、红色和致密性判据。带有误差棒的标注点（Y1、C、W和E）显示了Y1及其三个团块的测量颜色。测光测量取自Ma等人（2024）。

title: An Updated Characterization of Luminous Lyα emitters at the End of Reionization
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, submitted to ApJL, comments welcome
summary: We present a multi-wavelength physical characterization of 14 luminous Ly$α$ emitters (LAEs) at $z\approx6$, integrating deep ground-based Magellan/M2FS spectroscopy with heterogeneous JWST/NIRCam broad- and medium-band imaging. Identified via strong Ly$α$ lines with extreme Ly$α$ luminosities of ${>}10^{42.6}$ erg s$^{-1}$, the sample exhibits very large rest-frame equivalent widths (${\gtrsim}100$ Å) and steeply blue UV continua ($β_{\rm median}\simeq-2.2$, $-18.2>M_{\rm 1500}>-20.2$ mag). Crucially, the integration of NIRCam medium-band photometry (F410M) breaks the degeneracy between strong rest-optical nebular emission and Balmer breaks, resolving prior mass overestimations. The tightly constrained spectral energy distribution modeling demonstrates that these luminous LAEs tend to be unequivocally low-mass, ultra-young dwarf starbursts; half the sample is characterized by stellar masses of $M_* < 10^8 M_{\odot}$, ages $\lesssim10$ Myr, and negligible dust attenuation. We also map the production efficiency of ionizing photons and Ly$α$ escape fractions ($f_{\rm esc}^{\rm Lyα}$). The $f_{\rm esc}^{\rm Lyα}$ values are exceptionally high, with a median of ${\gtrsim}40$%, increasing for the bluer UV continua. Finally, analyzing spatial offsets between the Ly$α$ centroid and the stellar counterpart, we demonstrate empirically that internal dust content, rather than neutral hydrogen gas, dominate the suppression of Ly$α$ radiative transfer. Our study reveals that strong Ly$α$ emission of the luminous LAEs are generally attributed to both the vigorous starburst activities and the high $f_{\rm esc}^{\rm Lyα}$. Resembling Lyman continuum leakers, these extreme dwarf systems function as highly efficient ionizing engines at the conclusion of the Epoch of Reionization.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST/NIRCam中带测光，解析了14个z≈6明亮莱曼α发射体（LAEs）的物理性质：它们本质上是极年轻（<10 Myr）、低质量（M*<10⁸ M⊙）、无尘埃的矮星暴星系，莱曼α逃逸分数中位数>40%，类似于莱曼连续谱泄露者，是再电离末期的高效电离引擎。
AI.motivation: 已有研究对高红移明亮LAEs的质量估算存在争议（受强星云发射线与巴尔末断裂的简并影响），需要更精确的测光数据来区分这些效应，从而揭示其真实物理本质。
AI.method: 结合地面Magellan/M2FS光谱与JWST/NIRCam宽/中带测光（特别是F410M中带），通过SED拟合约束恒星质量、年龄、尘埃等参数，同时分析莱曼α逃逸分数、电离光子效率及空间偏移。
AI.result: 这些LAEs是低质量（半数<10⁸ M⊙）、超年轻（<10 Myr）、无尘埃的矮星暴；莱曼α逃逸分数中位数>40%，随UV连续谱变蓝而升高；Lyα与恒星成分的空间偏移表明内部尘埃是抑制Lyα辐射转移的主导因素，而非中性氢。
AI.conclusion: 明亮LAEs的强Lyα发射源于剧烈星暴活动与高逃逸分数共同作用；这些极端矮星系类似莱曼连续谱泄露者，是再电离末期的高效电离引擎。

recommendation.reason: 论文研究z≈6的明亮Lyα发射体（LAEs），属于高红移星系，与用户兴趣中的高红移星系动力学、尘埃、星暴等主题部分匹配。但论文主要关注再电离末期LAEs的物理性质（质量、年龄、逃逸分数），而非用户核心的强引力透镜或高红移星系动力学/运动学。用户核心作者均未出现，且论文未涉及引力透镜方法。因此相关性中等偏低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为高红移LAEs的物理性质，与用户兴趣中的高红移星系、尘埃、星暴有重叠，但用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜及高红移星系动力学/运动学，论文未涉及透镜或动力学分析。
recommendation.method_fit: 方法为SED拟合结合光谱与JWST测光，未使用引力透镜或动力学建模，与用户常用方法不匹配。
recommendation.author_fit: 论文作者均不在用户核心作者列表中。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文利用JWST中带测光解决质量简并，具有一定新颖性，但未涉及用户关注的高红移星系动力学或透镜研究。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学/运动学、偏振或多相气体等用户核心兴趣领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们对14个在z≈6处的明亮Lyα发射体（LAEs）进行了多波段物理表征，整合了深度的地面麦哲伦/M2FS光谱与异质的JWST/NIRCam宽带和介质带成像。这些样本通过强Lyα线识别，具有极高的Lyα光度（>10^{42.6} erg s^{-1}），表现出非常大的静止系等值宽度（≳100 Å）和陡峭的蓝色紫外连续谱（β_中位数≈-2.2，-18.2>M_{1500}>-20.2 mag）。关键的是，NIRCam介质带测光（F410M）的整合打破了强静止光学星云发射与巴尔默跳变之间的简并，解决了先前的质量高估问题。严格约束的光谱能量分布建模表明，这些明亮LAEs明确倾向于低质量、超年轻的矮星暴星系；一半样本的恒星质量M_* < 10^8 M_⊙，年龄≲10 Myr，且尘埃消光可忽略。我们还绘制了电离光子产生效率和Lyα逃逸分数（f_{esc}^{Lyα}）的图谱。f_{esc}^{Lyα}值异常高，中位数≳40%，且随着更蓝的紫外连续谱而增加。最后，通过分析Lyα质心与恒星对应体之间的空间偏移，我们实证表明内部尘埃含量（而非中性氢气）主导了Lyα辐射转移的抑制。我们的研究揭示，明亮LAEs的强Lyα发射通常归因于剧烈的星暴活动和高f_{esc}^{Lyα}。类似于莱曼连续谱泄露者，这些极端矮星系在再电离纪元末期充当了高效的电离引擎。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，明亮LAEs的强Lyα发射源于剧烈星暴活动与高逃逸分数共同作用；这些极端矮星系类似莱曼连续谱泄露者，是再电离末期的高效电离引擎。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Thumbnail images of the LAEs in our sample ( \(3\farcs 0\times 3\farcs 0\) , north is up and east to the left). Each LAE is shown with a top mark in each column. Each row shows images in different JWST/NIRCam bands indicated at the leftmost. In the lowest row (F444W), the dashed circles represent the \(1\farcs 6\) aperture centered at the Ly \(\alpha\) centroid. Note that COSMOS-z6lae-174 is not covered by F090W and F200W observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们样本中LAEs的缩略图（\(3\farcs 0\times 3\farcs 0\)，北向上，东向左）。每个LAE在每列顶部用标记显示。每行显示在最左侧指示的不同JWST/NIRCam波段图像。在最下面一行（F444W）中，虚线圆圈表示以Ly \(\alpha\)质心为中心的\(1\farcs 6\)孔径。注意，COSMOS-z6lae-174未被F090W和F200W观测覆盖。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: (a) SED fitting in the (rest-frame) UV to optical bands for the LAEs in our sample. In each panel for each LAE, the gray line represents the best-fit SED model with the light gray region representing \(1\sigma\) uncertainty. The red circles and black squares are the photometric data points from JWST/NIRCam imaging observations and computations of the best-fit mode, respectively. (b) Ly \(\alpha\) lines in the Magellan/M2FS spectra of LAEs in our sample. Flux density \(f_{\lambda}\) is shown in arbitrary units. The (slightly different) gray-shaded regions indicate \((\pm)1\sigma\) uncertainty level. The red lines are the best-fit Ly \(\alpha\) profiles based on the line templates while the light shaded region represent the 16–84th percentiles ( \(1\sigma\) ) of the posterior.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：(a) 我们样本中LAEs的（静止系）紫外到光学波段SED拟合。在每个LAE的面板中，灰线表示最佳拟合SED模型，浅灰色区域表示\(1\sigma\)不确定性。红色圆圈和黑色方块分别来自JWST/NIRCam成像观测的测光数据点和最佳拟合模式的计算。(b) 我们样本中LAEs的麦哲伦/M2FS光谱中的Ly \(\alpha\)线。通量密度\(f_{\lambda}\)以任意单位显示。灰色阴影区域（略有不同）表示\((\pm)1\sigma\)不确定性水平。红线是基于线模板的最佳拟合Ly \(\alpha\)轮廓，而浅阴影区域表示后验的16–84百分位数（\(1\sigma\)）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Measured properties of the LAEs in the sample of this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中样本LAEs的测量属性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison between a series of properties of the LAE sample in this work. In the \(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\) - \(\beta\) panel, the red and blue dashed lines indicate best-fit linear relations based on the LAE sample in this work and a (Ly \(\alpha\) -emitting) LBG sample from our previous work (Ning et al., 2023 ) , respectively. In the \(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\) -EW 0 (Ly \(\alpha\) ) panel, the dashed line gives the best-fit linear relation from our previous work (Ning et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本工作中LAE样本一系列属性的比较。在\(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\) - \(\beta\)面板中，红色和蓝色虚线分别表示基于本工作LAE样本和我们先前工作（Ning et al., 2023）中一个（Ly \(\alpha\)发射）LBG样本的最佳拟合线性关系。在\(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\) -EW 0 (Ly \(\alpha\))面板中，虚线给出了我们先前工作（Ning et al., 2024）的最佳拟合线性关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: SFR vs. \(M_{*}\) diagram: The blue dashed line show the best-fit SFMS at \(6 Clarke et al. ( 2024 ) . The magenta dashed lines represent the best-fit power-law relations from Rinaldi et al. ( 2022 ) . The crosses indicate the \(z>5\) galaxies from Curti et al. ( 2024 ) . The following open markers also represent the results from the literature. The square is LCEz4-M1, a Lyman continuum emitter (LCE) candidate at \(z=4.444\) reported by Zhu et al. ( 2026 ) . The thin diamond is RXCJ2248, a N-emitter at \(z=8.05\) from Topping et al. ( 2024 ) . The thick diamonds are JADES-GS-z8-0-LA and JADES-GS-z8-1-LA, respectively, two \(z\sim 8.5\) LAEs with \(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\) \(\sim 10\%\) from Witstok et al. ( 2025 ) . The upward triangle is GN-z8-LAE, an LAE \(z\approx 8.3\) from Navarro-Carrera et al. ( 2025 ) . The downward triangle is a very blue starburst galaxy with \(f_{esc}^{LyC}\) \(\sim 1\) at \(z\sim 10\) reported by Marques-Chaves et al. ( 2026 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SFR vs. \(M_{*}\)图：蓝色虚线显示Clarke et al. (2024)在\(6\)处的最佳拟合SFMS。品红色虚线表示Rinaldi et al. (2022)的最佳拟合幂律关系。叉号表示来自Curti et al. (2024)的\(z>5\)星系。以下开放标记也表示文献结果。方块是LCEz4-M1，一个由Zhu et al. (2026)报告的\(z=4.444\)处的莱曼连续谱发射体（LCE）候选体。细菱形是RXCJ2248，一个来自Topping et al. (2024)的\(z=8.05\)处的N发射体。粗菱形分别是JADES-GS-z8-0-LA和JADES-GS-z8-1-LA，两个来自Witstok et al. (2025)的\(z\sim 8.5\) LAEs，其\(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\) \(\sim 10\%\)。向上三角形是GN-z8-LAE，一个来自Navarro-Carrera et al. (2025)的\(z\approx 8.3\) LAE。向下三角形是一个由Marques-Chaves et al. (2026)报告的\(z\sim 10\)处\(f_{esc}^{LyC}\) \(\sim 1\)的非常蓝色星暴星系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Ly \(\alpha\) escape fraction ( \(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\) ) and offset to stellar components ( \(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\) ) as functions of dust attenuation ( \(A_{V}\) ) and Ly \(\alpha\) line width FWHM(Ly \(\alpha\) ). In the lower left panel, the dashed line qualitatively gives a limit trend of suppressing \(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\) as \(A_{V}\) increasing.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：Ly \(\alpha\)逃逸分数（\(f_{esc}^{Ly\alpha}\)）和与恒星成分的偏移（\(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\)）作为尘埃消光（\(A_{V}\)）和Ly \(\alpha\)线宽FWHM(Ly \(\alpha\))的函数。在左下方面板中，虚线定性地给出了随着\(A_{V}\)增加而抑制\(\Delta d_{Ly\alpha}\)的极限趋势。
